title: CLT with TLC
body: You are a super fan of the girl group TLC and are interested in estimating the average amount of plays their songs have online. You generate an 80% confidence interval for this parameter to be [700000, 1200000] based on a random sample of $$50$$ songs. Are each of the following statements true or false? Give a brief explanation for each question.\n\nNote: Generally, $$n$$ $$ \geq $$ $$30$$ is considered the minimum sample size for CLT to take effect!
